<!DOCTYPE html>
<html dir="rtl" lang="he">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<meta name="myop:size" content='{"width":"100%","height":"100%","minWidth":320}'>
<script type="myop/types">
interface ChartDataPoint { date: string; views: number; saves: number; phoneCalls: number; }
interface MyopInitData {
  theme?: 'light' | 'dark';
  stats: { active: number; notActive: number; expired: number; totalAds: number; };
  messages: { count: number; bodyText: string; subtitle: string; };
  insights: { title: string; hasData: boolean; items?: Array<{ icon: string; title: string; description: string; }>; };
  chart: { data: ChartDataPoint[]; selectedFilter: string; filterOptions: Array<{ value: string; label: string }>; };
}
interface MyopCtaPayloads {
  'accessibility-clicked': void;
  'chart-filter-changed': { value: string; label: string };
  'chart-toggle-changed': { series: 'views' | 'saves' | 'phoneCalls'; enabled: boolean };
  'chat-clicked': void;
  'insight-action-clicked': { action: string };
  'size-requested': { width?: number | null; height?: number | null; minWidth?: number | null; maxWidth?: number | null; minHeight?: number | null; maxHeight?: number | null; required?: boolean; };
  'stat-card-clicked': { type: 'active' | 'notActive' | 'expired' | 'totalAds' };
}
declare function myop_init_interface(): MyopInitData;
declare function myop_init_interface(data: MyopInitData): void;
declare function myop_cta_handler<K extends keyof MyopCtaPayloads>(action: K, payload: MyopCtaPayloads[K]): void;
</script>
<style>
  @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Heebo:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap');

  :root {
    --bg: #ffffff;
    --surface: #ffffff;
    --surface-hover: #f8f8fb;
    --surface-active: #eeeef3;
    --surface-elevated: #ffffff;
    --border: #e2e4ea;
    --border-light: #eceef2;
    --text-primary: #111827;
    --text-secondary: #5f6577;
    --text-tertiary: #9198a8;
    --orange: #f97316;
    --orange-vivid: #fb923c;
    --orange-soft: rgba(249,115,22,0.07);
    --orange-hover: rgba(249,115,22,0.12);
    --orange-glow: rgba(249,115,22,0);
    --yad2-deep: #e85d04;
    --yad2-orange: #f97316;
    --yad2-warm: #fb923c;
    --yad2-amber: #f5a623;
    --yad2-gold: #fbbf24;
    --yad2-gold-soft: rgba(251,191,36,0.12);
    --yad2-deep-soft: rgba(232,93,4,0.10);
    --green: #10b981;
    --red: #ef4444;
    --purple: #8b5cf6;
    --green-soft: rgba(16,185,129,0.08);
    --red-soft: rgba(239,68,68,0.08);
    --purple-soft: rgba(139,92,246,0.08);
    --shadow-sm: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.04), 0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.03);
    --shadow-md: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.06), 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.04);
    --shadow-lg: 0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.08), 0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.04);
    --chart-grid: #eceef2;
    --chart-label: #9198a8;
    --tooltip-bg: #ffffff;
    --tooltip-border: #e2e4ea;
    --empty-icon: #d1d5db;
    --empty-icon-accent: #f97316;
    --empty-bg: transparent;
    --radius: 16px;
    --radius-sm: 10px;
    --radius-xs: 8px;
    --stat-number-color: var(--text-primary);
    --card-border-width: 1px;
    --a11y-bg: #1f2937;
    --a11y-shadow: var(--shadow-lg);
    --crosshair: rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
  }

  [data-theme="dark"] {
    --bg: #0c0e16;
    --surface: #161924;
    --surface-hover: #1e2233;
    --surface-active: #262b3d;
    --surface-elevated: #1c2030;
    --border: #262b3d;
    --border-light: #1e2233;
    --text-primary: #f1f3f9;
    --text-secondary: #8990a8;
    --text-tertiary: #555d75;
    --orange: #fb923c;
    --orange-vivid: #fdba74;
    --orange-soft: rgba(251,146,60,0.1);
    --orange-hover: rgba(251,146,60,0.16);
    --orange-glow: rgba(251,146,60,0.06);
    --yad2-deep: #fb923c;
    --yad2-orange: #fdba74;
    --yad2-warm: #fcd34d;
    --yad2-amber: #fde68a;
    --yad2-gold: #fef3c7;
    --yad2-gold-soft: rgba(253,224,71,0.12);
    --yad2-deep-soft: rgba(251,146,60,0.12);
    --green: #34d399;
    --red: #fb7185;
    --purple: #a78bfa;
    --green-soft: rgba(52,211,153,0.1);
    --red-soft: rgba(251,113,133,0.1);
    --purple-soft: rgba(167,139,250,0.1);
    --shadow-sm: 0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.3), 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.02);
    --shadow-md: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.35), 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.03);
    --shadow-lg: 0 12px 48px rgba(0,0,0,0.5), 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.04);
    --chart-grid: #262b3d;
    --chart-label: #555d75;
    --tooltip-bg: #1c2030;
    --tooltip-border: #333a50;
    --empty-icon: #333a50;
    --empty-icon-accent: #fb923c;
    --empty-bg: rgba(251,146,60,0.03);
    --stat-number-color: #f1f3f9;
    --card-border-width: 1px;
    --a11y-bg: #f1f3f9;
    --a11y-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.5), 0 0 24px rgba(251,146,60,0.08);
    --crosshair: rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
  }

  * { margin:0; padding:0; box-sizing:border-box }

  html, body {
    width:100%; height:100%; overflow:hidden;
    font-family:'Heebo', sans-serif;
    background:var(--bg); color:var(--text-primary);
    direction:rtl;
    -webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;
    -moz-osx-font-smoothing:grayscale;
    transition:background 0.4s ease, color 0.4s ease;
  }

  #app-root {
    width:100%; height:100%;
    display:flex; flex-direction:column;
    overflow-y:auto; overflow-x:hidden;
    scroll-behavior:smooth;
  }

  /* ===== ANIMATIONS ===== */
  @keyframes fadeSlideUp {
    from { opacity:0; transform:translateY(18px) }
    to { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0) }
  }
  @keyframes fadeIn {
    from { opacity:0 }
    to { opacity:1 }
  }
  @keyframes countPulse {
    0%, 100% { transform:scale(1) }
    50% { transform:scale(1.15) }
  }
  @keyframes badgePing {
    0% { box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(232,93,4,0.5) }
    70% { box-shadow:0 0 0 8px rgba(251,191,36,0) }
    100% { box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(251,191,36,0) }
  }
  @keyframes insightSlideIn {
    from { opacity:0; transform:translateX(12px) }
    to { opacity:1; transform:translateX(0) }
  }
  @keyframes scaleIn {
    from { opacity:0; transform:scale(0.92) }
    to { opacity:1; transform:scale(1) }
  }
  @keyframes shimmer {
    0% { background-position:200% 0 }
    100% { background-position:-200% 0 }
  }
  @keyframes float {
    0%,100% { transform:translateY(0) }
    50% { transform:translateY(-6px) }
  }
  @keyframes dropdownReveal {
    from { opacity:0; transform:translateY(-4px) }
    to { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0) }
  }

  /* ===== ENTRANCE ANIMATIONS ===== */
  .anim-card { animation:fadeSlideUp 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1) both }
  .anim-stagger-1 { animation-delay:0.04s }
  .anim-stagger-2 { animation-delay:0.1s }
  .anim-stagger-3 { animation-delay:0.16s }
  .anim-stagger-4 { animation-delay:0.22s }

  /* ===== PAGE ===== */
  .page {
    display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center;
    padding:36px 24px 56px;
    min-height:min-content;
  }

  .title {
    font-weight:600;
    font-size:1.5rem;
    margin-bottom:28px;
    width:100%; max-width:1038px;
    letter-spacing:-0.01em;
    line-height:1.2;
    animation:fadeSlideUp 0.45s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1) both;
  }

  /* ===== LAYOUT ===== */
  .statsContainer { display:flex; gap:24px; width:100%; max-width:1038px }
  .right { flex:1; min-width:0 }
  .left { width:310px; flex-shrink:0 }

  /* ===== STAT CARDS ===== */
  .myDataContainer {
    width:100%; display:flex; justify-content:space-evenly;
    background:var(--surface);
    border:var(--card-border-width) solid var(--border);
    border-radius:var(--radius);
    box-shadow:var(--shadow-sm);
    min-height:148px; align-items:center;
    transition:box-shadow 0.3s ease, background 0.4s ease, border-color 0.4s ease;
    animation:fadeSlideUp 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1) 0.05s both;
  }
  .myDataContainer:hover { box-shadow:var(--shadow-md) }

  .statsBox {
    text-align:center; display:flex; flex-direction:column;
    justify-content:center; align-items:center;
    min-width:105px; gap:10px;
    cursor:pointer; padding:14px 10px;
    border-radius:var(--radius-sm);
    transition:background 0.2s, transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1);
    position:relative;
  }
  .statsBox:hover { background:var(--surface-hover); transform:translateY(-3px) }
  .statsBox:active { background:var(--surface-active); transform:translateY(0) }
  .statsBox:hover .statNumber { color:var(--orange); transition:color 0.25s }

  .statNumber {
    font-size:2.25rem; font-weight:500;
    line-height:1; letter-spacing:-0.02em;
    color:var(--stat-number-color);
    font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;
    transition:color 0.3s ease, transform 0.3s ease;
  }
  .statLabel {
    font-weight:400; font-size:0.8125rem;
    color:var(--text-secondary);
    letter-spacing:-0.01em;
    transition:color 0.4s ease;
  }

  .divider {
    border-left:1px solid var(--border); height:80px; flex-shrink:0;
    transition:border-color 0.4s ease;
  }

  /* ===== CHART WRAPPER ===== */
  .chartWrapper {
    background:var(--surface);
    border:var(--card-border-width) solid var(--border);
    border-radius:var(--radius);
    box-shadow:var(--shadow-sm);
    margin-top:20px; padding:20px 24px 24px;
    display:flex; flex-direction:column;
    transition:box-shadow 0.3s ease, background 0.4s ease, border-color 0.4s ease;
    animation:fadeSlideUp 0.55s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1) 0.12s both;
  }
  .chartWrapper:hover { box-shadow:var(--shadow-md) }

  .chartTop {
    display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center;
    padding:4px 0 18px;
  }
  .chartTitle { font-weight:500; font-size:0.9375rem; letter-spacing:-0.01em }

  /* ===== FILTER SELECT ===== */
  .filterSelect { position:relative; min-width:168px }

  .textFieldBox {
    background:var(--surface);
    border:var(--card-border-width) solid var(--border);
    border-radius:var(--radius-xs);
    padding:0 14px; display:flex; align-items:center;
    cursor:pointer; min-height:42px;
    transition:border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s, background 0.4s;
    user-select:none;
  }
  .textFieldBox:hover { border-color:var(--text-tertiary) }
  .textFieldBox.open {
    border-color:var(--orange);
    box-shadow:0 0 0 3px var(--orange-soft);
    border-radius:var(--radius-xs) var(--radius-xs) 0 0;
  }
  .textFieldBox .value {
    flex:1; font-family:'Heebo',sans-serif;
    font-size:0.875rem; font-weight:400;
    color:var(--text-primary); white-space:nowrap;
  }

  .flipIcon {
    width:1.125rem; height:1.125rem; flex-shrink:0;
    transition:transform 0.35s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1);
    color:var(--text-secondary);
  }
  .flipIcon.flipped { transform:rotate(180deg) }

  .dropdown {
    position:absolute; top:100%; left:0; right:0;
    background:var(--surface-elevated);
    border-radius:0 0 var(--radius-sm) var(--radius-sm);
    box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);
    border:1px solid var(--border); border-top:none;
    z-index:10; overflow:hidden;
    max-height:0; opacity:0;
    transition:max-height 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), opacity 0.2s ease;
    pointer-events:none;
  }
  .dropdown.open {
    max-height:260px; opacity:1;
    pointer-events:auto;
  }

  .dropdown-item {
    padding:12px 16px; font-size:0.9375rem; font-weight:400;
    cursor:pointer; transition:background 0.15s, padding-right 0.2s;
    font-family:'Heebo',sans-serif;
    display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between;
    color:var(--text-primary);
  }
  .dropdown-item:hover { background:var(--surface-hover); padding-right:20px }
  .dropdown-item.selected { color:var(--orange); font-weight:400 }

  .dropdown-check { width:16px; height:16px; color:var(--orange); flex-shrink:0; opacity:0; transition:opacity 0.2s, transform 0.2s }
  .dropdown-item.selected .dropdown-check { opacity:1; transform:scale(1) }

  /* ===== CHART INNER ===== */
  .innerContainer {
    border:1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius:var(--radius-sm);
    padding:18px 20px 14px;
    display:flex; flex-direction:column;
    transition:border-color 0.4s ease;
  }

  .checkboxesContainer {
    display:flex; gap:28px; margin-bottom:18px; flex-wrap:wrap;
  }

  .y2Checkbox {
    display:inline-flex; align-items:center;
    cursor:pointer; user-select:none; gap:8px;
    transition:opacity 0.15s;
  }
  .y2Checkbox:active { opacity:0.7 }

  .cb-box {
    width:18px; height:18px; border-radius:5px;
    border:2px solid var(--text-tertiary);
    display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
    transition:all 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1); flex-shrink:0;
  }
  .cb-box.checked { border-color:transparent; transform:scale(1.05) }
  .cb-box:not(.checked) { transform:scale(1) }
  .cb-box.purple.checked { background:var(--purple) }
  .cb-box.red.checked { background:var(--red) }
  .cb-box.green.checked { background:var(--green) }
  .cb-box svg { opacity:0; transition:opacity 0.2s, transform 0.25s; transform:scale(0.5) }
  .cb-box.checked svg { opacity:1; transform:scale(1) }
  .cb-label { font-size:0.75rem; font-weight:400; color:var(--text-secondary) }

  /* ===== CHART CANVAS ===== */
  .chartCanvas { position:relative; width:100%; flex:1; min-height:230px }
  .chartCanvas canvas { width:100%!important; height:100%!important; cursor:crosshair }

  .chart-crosshair {
    position:absolute; top:20px; width:1px;
    background:var(--crosshair);
    pointer-events:none; opacity:0;
    transition:opacity 0.15s;
    z-index:2;
  }
  .chart-crosshair.visible { opacity:1 }

  .chart-tooltip {
    position:absolute;
    background:var(--tooltip-bg);
    border:1px solid var(--tooltip-border);
    border-radius:var(--radius-sm);
    box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);
    padding:14px 18px; pointer-events:none;
    z-index:5; font-size:0.8125rem;
    opacity:0; transition:opacity 0.15s, transform 0.15s;
    transform:translateY(4px);
    white-space:nowrap; direction:rtl;
  }
  .chart-tooltip.visible { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0) }
  .tooltip-date { font-weight:500; margin-bottom:10px; font-size:0.8125rem; color:var(--text-primary) }
  .tooltip-row { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; margin-top:5px; color:var(--text-secondary) }
  .tooltip-dot { width:9px; height:9px; border-radius:50%; flex-shrink:0 }
  .tooltip-value { font-weight:500; margin-right:auto; direction:ltr; color:var(--text-primary) }

  /* ===== CHART EMPTY ===== */
  .chart-empty {
    display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
    min-height:230px; gap:20px; padding:40px 24px;
    background:var(--empty-bg); border-radius:var(--radius-sm);
    animation:scaleIn 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1) both;
  }
  .chart-empty-icon { width:140px; height:140px; position:relative }
  .chart-empty-icon svg { width:100%; height:100%; overflow:visible }
  .chart-empty-title { font-size:0.9375rem; font-weight:500; color:var(--text-primary); letter-spacing:-0.01em }
  .chart-empty-desc {
    font-size:0.8125rem; font-weight:400;
    color:var(--text-tertiary); text-align:center;
    max-width:280px; line-height:1.6;
  }

  /* ===== MESSAGES ===== */
  .messagesContainer {
    border:var(--card-border-width) solid var(--border);
    border-radius:var(--radius);
    box-shadow:var(--shadow-sm);
    background:var(--surface);
    display:flex; align-items:center;
    padding:16px 20px; cursor:pointer;
    transition:box-shadow 0.3s ease, transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), background 0.4s;
    animation:fadeSlideUp 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1) 0.08s both;
  }
  .messagesContainer:hover { box-shadow:var(--shadow-md); transform:translateY(-3px) }
  .messagesContainer:active { transform:translateY(0) }
  .messagesContainer:hover .chatIcon { transform:scale(1.08); transition:transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1) }

  .chatIcon { width:46px; height:46px; flex-shrink:0; transition:transform 0.3s ease }
  .messageText { flex:1; margin-right:16px }
  .bodyText { font-weight:400; font-size:0.8125rem; margin-bottom:4px; color:var(--text-primary); line-height:1.4 }
  .desktopTitleOnly { font-size:0.75rem; color:var(--text-tertiary); font-weight:400 }

  .messagesCount {
    background:var(--orange); color:#fff;
    min-width:24px; height:24px;
    border-radius:12px; text-align:center;
    font-size:0.6875rem; font-weight:500;
    line-height:24px; flex-shrink:0;
    padding:0 7px;
    animation:badgePing 2s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1) 0.8s;
    box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(232,93,4,0.35);
  }

  /* ===== INSIGHTS ===== */
  .strongAdContainer {
    border:var(--card-border-width) solid var(--border);
    border-radius:var(--radius);
    box-shadow:var(--shadow-sm);
    background:var(--surface);
    padding:22px 22px 18px; margin-top:20px;
    transition:box-shadow 0.3s ease, background 0.4s;
    animation:fadeSlideUp 0.55s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1) 0.16s both;
  }
  .strongAdContainer:hover { box-shadow:var(--shadow-md) }

  .adTitle { font-size:0.9375rem; font-weight:500; letter-spacing:-0.01em }

  .insight-items { margin-top:16px }

  .insight-item {
    display:flex; align-items:center; gap:14px;
    padding:12px 10px;
    border-bottom:1px solid var(--border-light);
    cursor:pointer;
    transition:background 0.2s, transform 0.15s;
    border-radius:var(--radius-xs); margin:0 -10px;
    animation:insightSlideIn 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1) both;
  }
  .insight-item:nth-child(1) { animation-delay:0.06s }
  .insight-item:nth-child(2) { animation-delay:0.12s }
  .insight-item:nth-child(3) { animation-delay:0.18s }
  .insight-item:nth-child(4) { animation-delay:0.24s }
  .insight-item:nth-child(5) { animation-delay:0.30s }
  .insight-item:last-child { border-bottom:none }
  .insight-item:hover { background:var(--surface-hover) }
  .insight-item:active { transform:scale(0.985) }

  .insight-icon {
    width:40px; height:40px; border-radius:12px;
    display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
    flex-shrink:0;
    transition:transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1);
  }
  .insight-item:hover .insight-icon { transform:scale(1.1) }
  .insight-icon svg { width:18px; height:18px }
  .insight-icon.icon-camera { background:var(--orange-soft); color:var(--orange) }
  .insight-icon.icon-price { background:var(--green-soft); color:var(--green) }
  .insight-icon.icon-location { background:var(--purple-soft); color:var(--purple) }
  .insight-icon.icon-text { background:var(--red-soft); color:var(--red) }
  .insight-icon.icon-star { background:var(--orange-soft); color:var(--orange) }
  .insight-icon.icon-default { background:var(--surface-hover); color:var(--text-tertiary) }

  .insight-content { flex:1; min-width:0 }
  .insight-content-title { font-weight:400; font-size:0.8125rem; color:var(--text-primary); margin-bottom:2px }
  .insight-content-desc {
    font-size:0.75rem; font-weight:400;
    color:var(--text-tertiary); line-height:1.5;
    white-space:nowrap; overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis;
  }

  .insight-arrow {
    width:16px; height:16px; color:var(--text-tertiary);
    flex-shrink:0; transition:color 0.25s, transform 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1);
  }
  .insight-item:hover .insight-arrow { color:var(--orange); transform:translateX(-5px) }

  /* ===== INSIGHTS EMPTY ===== */
  .insights-empty {
    display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center;
    padding:32px 16px 24px; gap:16px;
    background:var(--empty-bg); border-radius:var(--radius-sm);
    margin-top:12px;
    animation:scaleIn 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1) 0.2s both;
  }
  .insights-empty-visual { width:150px; height:140px; position:relative }
  .insights-empty-visual svg { overflow:visible }
  .insights-empty-title { font-size:0.875rem; font-weight:500; color:var(--text-primary) }
  .insights-empty-desc {
    font-size:0.8125rem; font-weight:400;
    color:var(--text-tertiary); text-align:center;
    line-height:1.55; max-width:240px;
  }

  /* ===== ACCESSIBILITY ===== */
  .accessibilityButton {
    position:fixed; bottom:18px; left:18px;
    width:46px; height:46px;
    background:var(--a11y-bg);
    border-radius:50%;
    display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
    cursor:pointer; z-index:100; border:none;
    box-shadow:var(--a11y-shadow);
    transition:transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1), box-shadow 0.3s, background 0.4s;
    animation:scaleIn 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1) 0.4s both;
  }
  .accessibilityButton:hover { transform:scale(1.12) }
  .accessibilityButton:active { transform:scale(0.92) }

  [data-theme="dark"] .accessibilityButton svg path { fill:#0c0e16 }

  /* ===== OVERLAY ===== */
  .overlay {
    position:fixed; top:0; left:0; right:0; bottom:0; z-index:9;
    background:transparent; opacity:0;
    pointer-events:none;
    transition:opacity 0.25s;
  }
  .overlay.visible { opacity:1; pointer-events:auto; background:rgba(0,0,0,0.05) }
  [data-theme="dark"] .overlay.visible { background:rgba(0,0,0,0.2) }

  /* ===== RESPONSIVE ===== */
  @media screen and (max-width:880px) {
    .page { padding:20px 14px 88px }
    .title { font-size:1.25rem; margin-bottom:20px }
    .statsContainer { flex-direction:column; gap:0 }
    .left { width:100%; margin-top:16px }
    .right { width:100% }
    .myDataContainer { flex-wrap:wrap; min-height:auto; padding:10px; gap:10px; justify-content:center }
    .statsBox {
      flex:0 0 calc(50% - 6px); min-width:unset;
      background:var(--surface-hover); border-radius:var(--radius-sm);
      padding:18px 10px; border:1px solid var(--border-light);
    }
    .statsBox:hover { background:var(--surface-active); transform:none }
    .divider { display:none }
    .statNumber { font-size:2rem }
    .statLabel { font-size:0.75rem }
    .chartWrapper { margin-top:12px; padding:16px 16px 20px }
    .chartTop { flex-direction:column; align-items:flex-start; gap:12px }
    .filterSelect { max-width:100%; width:100% }
    .innerContainer { padding:14px }
    .checkboxesContainer { flex-direction:column; gap:12px }
    .messagesContainer { margin-top:0 }
    .desktopTitleOnly-desktop { display:none }
    .strongAdContainer { margin-top:12px; min-height:unset }
  }
  @media screen and (min-width:881px) { .desktopTitleOnly-mobile { display:none } }

  /* Reduce motion for a11y */
  @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
    *, *::before, *::after {
      animation-duration:0.01ms !important;
      animation-iteration-count:1 !important;
      transition-duration:0.01ms !important;
    }
  }
</style>

      canvas.width=W*dpr;canvas.height=H*dpr;canvas.style.width=W+'px';canvas.style.height=H+'px';
      ctx.setTransform(dpr,0,0,dpr,0,0);
      var pad={top:20,right:16,bottom:36,left:44},cw=W-pad.left-pad.right,ch=H-pad.top-pad.bottom;
      var maxVal=1,keys=['views','saves','phoneCalls'];
      keys.forEach(function(k){if(!chartSeries[k])return;data.forEach(function(d){if(d[k]>maxVal)maxVal=d[k]})});
      maxVal=Math.ceil(maxVal/5)*5||5;ctx.clearRect(0,0,W,H);
      var gridColor=getComputedStyle(document.documentElement).getPropertyValue('--chart-grid').trim();
      var labelColor=getComputedStyle(document.documentElement).getPropertyValue('--chart-label').trim();

      /* Solid grid lines */
      ctx.strokeStyle=gridColor;ctx.lineWidth=1;ctx.setLineDash([]);
      for(var g=0;g<=5;g++){
        var gy=pad.top+(ch/5)*g;
        ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(pad.left,gy);ctx.lineTo(W-pad.right,gy);ctx.stroke();
        ctx.fillStyle=labelColor;ctx.font='11px Heebo';ctx.textAlign='left';
        ctx.fillText(Math.round(maxVal-(maxVal/5)*g),4,gy+4);
      }
      ctx.fillStyle=labelColor;ctx.font='10px Heebo';ctx.textAlign='center';
      var step=Math.max(1,Math.floor(data.length/7));
      for(var xi=0;xi<data.length;xi+=step){ctx.fillText(data[xi].date,pad.left+(cw/(data.length-1))*xi,H-8)}
      if((data.length-1)%step!==0)ctx.fillText(data[data.length-1].date,pad.left+cw,H-8);
      var dc=Math.ceil(data.length*Math.min(progress,1));

      /* Straight lines with filled area */
      var surfaceColor=getComputedStyle(document.documentElement).getPropertyValue('--surface').trim();
      keys.forEach(function(k){
        if(!chartSeries[k])return;var c=RAW_COLORS[k];
        var pts=[];
        for(var i=0;i<dc;i++){
          var x=pad.left+(cw/(data.length-1))*i;
          var y=pad.top+ch-(data[i][k]/maxVal)*ch;
          pts.push({x:x,y:y});
        }
        if(pts.length<1)return;

        /* Filled area under line */
        if(dc>1){
          ctx.save();ctx.globalAlpha=0.15;ctx.fillStyle=c;ctx.beginPath();
          ctx.moveTo(pts[0].x,pts[0].y);
          for(var f=1;f<pts.length;f++){ctx.lineTo(pts[f].x,pts[f].y)}
          ctx.lineTo(pts[pts.length-1].x,pad.top+ch);
          ctx.lineTo(pts[0].x,pad.top+ch);
          ctx.closePath();ctx.fill();ctx.restore();
        }

        /* Line stroke */
        ctx.strokeStyle=c;ctx.lineWidth=2;ctx.lineJoin='round';ctx.lineCap='round';ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(pts[0].x,pts[0].y);
        for(var p=1;p<pts.length;p++){ctx.lineTo(pts[p].x,pts[p].y)}
        ctx.stroke();

        /* Hollow ring dots */
        for(var d=0;d<dc;d++){
          var dx=pts[d].x,dy=pts[d].y;
          ctx.fillStyle=surfaceColor;ctx.strokeStyle=c;ctx.lineWidth=2;
          ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(dx,dy,4,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fill();ctx.stroke();
        }
      });
    }

    function animate(){
      if(animFrame)cancelAnimationFrame(animFrame);
      var start=null;
      function tick(ts){
        if(!start)start=ts;
        var p=Math.min((ts-start)/800,1);
        p=1-(1-p)*(1-p)*(1-p);/* ease out cubic */
        draw(p);
        if(p<1)animFrame=requestAnimationFrame(tick);
      }
      animFrame=requestAnimationFrame(tick);
    }

    /* Crosshair + Tooltip */
    var pad={top:20,right:16,bottom:36,left:44};
    crosshair.style.height=(chartCanvas.getBoundingClientRect().height-pad.top-pad.bottom)+'px';

    canvas.addEventListener('mousemove',function(e){
      var data=state.chart.data;if(!data||!data.length)return;
      var rect=canvas.getBoundingClientRect(),mx=e.clientX-rect.left,W=rect.width;
      var cw=W-pad.left-pad.right;
      var idx=Math.round((mx-pad.left)/cw*(data.length-1));idx=Math.max(0,Math.min(data.length-1,idx));
      var pt=data[idx],any=chartSeries.views||chartSeries.saves||chartSeries.phoneCalls;

      /* Crosshair */
      var cx=pad.left+(cw/(data.length-1))*idx;
      crosshair.style.left=cx+'px';
      crosshair.classList.toggle('visible',any);

      if(!any){tooltip.classList.remove('visible');return}
      var rows='';
      if(chartSeries.views)rows+='<div class="tooltip-row"><span class="tooltip-dot" style="background:'+RAW_COLORS.views+'"></span><span>'+LABELS.views+'</span><span class="tooltip-value">'+pt.views+'</span></div>';
      if(chartSeries.saves)rows+='<div class="tooltip-row"><span class="tooltip-dot" style="background:'+RAW_COLORS.saves+'"></span><span>'+LABELS.saves+'</span><span class="tooltip-value">'+pt.saves+'</span></div>';
      if(chartSeries.phoneCalls)rows+='<div class="tooltip-row"><span class="tooltip-dot" style="background:'+RAW_COLORS.phoneCalls+'"></span><span>'+LABELS.phoneCalls+'</span><span class="tooltip-value">'+pt.phoneCalls+'</span></div>';
      tooltip.innerHTML='<div class="tooltip-date">'+esc(pt.date)+'</div>'+rows;tooltip.classList.add('visible');
      var ttW=tooltip.offsetWidth,posX=cx-ttW/2;
      if(posX<4)posX=4;if(posX+ttW>W-4)posX=W-ttW-4;tooltip.style.left=posX+'px';tooltip.style.top='0px';
    });
    canvas.addEventListener('mouseleave',function(){tooltip.classList.remove('visible');crosshair.classList.remove('visible')});
    canvas.addEventListener('touchmove',function(e){e.preventDefault();var t=e.touches[0];canvas.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('mousemove',{clientX:t.clientX,clientY:t.clientY}))},{passive:false});
    canvas.addEventListener('touchend',function(){tooltip.classList.remove('visible');crosshair.classList.remove('visible')});
    window._chartDraw=draw;animate();
  }

  $statsCards.addEventListener('click',function(e){var b=e.target.closest('.statsBox');if(b)window.myop_cta_handler('stat-card-clicked',{type:b.dataset.stat})});
  $filterBtn.addEventListener('click',function(e){e.stopPropagation();dropdownOpen=!dropdownOpen;$dropdown.classList.toggle('open',dropdownOpen);$filterBtn.classList.toggle('open',dropdownOpen);$flipIcon.classList.toggle('flipped',dropdownOpen);$overlay.classList.toggle('visible',dropdownOpen)});
  $dropdown.addEventListener('click',function(e){var item=e.target.closest('.dropdown-item');if(!item)return;var val=item.dataset.value,opt=state.chart.filterOptions.find(function(o){return o.value===val});if(opt){state.chart.selectedFilter=val;renderFilter();renderChartArea();window.myop_cta_handler('chart-filter-changed',{value:val,label:opt.label})}closeDD()});
  function closeDD(){dropdownOpen=false;$dropdown.classList.remove('open');$filterBtn.classList.remove('open');$flipIcon.classList.remove('flipped');$overlay.classList.remove('visible')}
  $overlay.addEventListener('click',closeDD);
  document.addEventListener('click',function(e){if(dropdownOpen&&!$filterBtn.contains(e.target)&&!$dropdown.contains(e.target))closeDD()});
  $checkboxes.addEventListener('click',function(e){var cb=e.target.closest('.y2Checkbox');if(!cb)return;var s=cb.dataset.series;chartSeries[s]=!chartSeries[s];renderCheckboxes();if(window._chartDraw)window._chartDraw(1);window.myop_cta_handler('chart-toggle-changed',{series:s,enabled:chartSeries[s]})});
  $messagesBox.addEventListener('click',function(){window.myop_cta_handler('chat-clicked')});
  $insightsBox.addEventListener('click',function(e){var it=e.target.closest('.insight-item');if(it)window.myop_cta_handler('insight-action-clicked',{action:it.dataset.action})});
  $a11yBtn.addEventListener('click',function(){window.myop_cta_handler('accessibility-clicked')});
  var rt;window.addEventListener('resize',function(){clearTimeout(rt);rt=setTimeout(function(){if(state&&window._chartDraw)window._chartDraw(1)},100)});

  window.myop_init_interface=function(data){if(!data)return state;state=data;render()};
  window.myop_cta_handler=function(action,payload){console.log('[Myop CTA]',action,payload)};
})();
</script>

    insights:{title:'תובנות על מודעה שלך',hasData:true,items:[
      {icon:'camera',title:'הוסיפו תמונות',description:'מודעות עם תמונות מקבלות פי 3 יותר צפיות'},
      {icon:'price',title:'עדכנו את המחיר',description:'המחיר שלכם גבוה מ-70% מהמודעות הדומות'},
      {icon:'location',title:'הוסיפו כתובת מדויקת',description:'מודעות עם כתובת מקבלות יותר פניות'}
    ]},
    chart:{data:chartData,selectedFilter:'7days',filterOptions:[
      {value:'7days',label:'7 ימים אחרונים'},{value:'14days',label:'14 ימים אחרונים'},
      {value:'30days',label:'30 ימים אחרונים'},{value:'90days',label:'90 ימים אחרונים'}
    ]}
  });
})();
